problem id: e79c8c5a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(6) OR NOT SHR(1)

examples:
  01000100 -> 11011101
  10100111 -> 10101110
  11011000 -> 10010011
  10100001 -> 10101111
  01011110 -> 11010001
  00000011 -> 11111110
  01010100 -> 11010101
  10000000 -> 10111111
  11010100 -> 10010111
  00101111 -> 11101000

query: 11111001
predicted answer: 10000011
